features.name: Map Component Migration
features.description: Migrate Leaflet map to Mapbox GL JS in React/TypeScript, maintaining country textures, markers, and responsive behavior.

features.name: Swiper Destinations Refactor
features.description: Refactor legacy Vanilla JS Swiper into a strict TypeScript module without React, preserving custom rotation and loop logic.

features.name: Performance: Island Code-Splitting
features.description: Implement dynamic imports and manual chunking to ensure Mapbox, React, and Swiper libraries are only loaded on demand.

features.name: Swiper Pagination Micro-interaction
features.description: Enable pagination bullets with a micro-interaction animation in the destinations swiper.
